name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Item catalog: CSV import + dropdown selector for booking extras; DB version 19.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.07: Item catalog — CSV import of Square items, dropdown selector on booking page auto-fills price, custom item fallback. DB version 19.
  • 1.9.2.06: New booking items system — add/remove named extras (dinners, drinks, etc.) on the booking detail page. Included as individual line items on IN invoices. Items total feeds into booking totals. DB version 18.
